calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-25-2021 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-21-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DANA SACK, Esq. of Sack Rosendin, LLP (Tel: 510-286-2200) as movant/attorney of record for defendant Daniel Seng;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO DEFENDANT DANIEL SENG.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is denied without prejudice. In order to avoid foreseeable prejudice to defendant, before the Court will grant the motion, counsel must first obtain a continuance of the impending November 8, 2021 trial date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Motion to Be Relieved As Counsel As to Defendant Daniel Seng.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. The motion was not served and filed at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2021 Set For Trial On Nov-08-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
